title: Gerald: may he be praised
description: A mod that adds blocks for use when praising the pufferfish named gerald.
body:
> PRIASE ARE LORD GARARLD. HE WILL BRING US TO HIS IMAGE.
-CULT

**Adds**
- Five Blocks
- _nothing else_

heres an image
![All the blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/003f5c1b4893262e4239732e9fc642d899637346.png)


_this mod is a refence to the pufferfish Gerald from [this video](https://youtu.be/Tjr_CxOxQ04)_
